name: Proofpoint
description: This plugin is used to pull IOCs of type URL, SHA256, Domain, and FQDN from the Proofpoint TAP (Targeted Attack Protection) Dashboard under Threats. The plugin supports pull retraction of indicators from Proofpoint. This plugin does not support sharing of indicators to Proofpoint platform.

configuration.label: Base URL
configuration.description: Proofpoint TAP API Base URL. e.g. https://tap-api-v2.proofpoint.com

configuration.label: Username
configuration.description: Proofpoint API username can be generated from the 'TAP Dashboard > Settings > Connected Applications > Create New Credential'.

configuration.label: Password
configuration.description: Proofpoint API password can be generated from the 'TAP Dashboard > Settings > Connected Applications > Create New Credential'.

configuration.label: Event Type(s)
configuration.description: Select event types to pull threat indicators (URL, SHA256, Domain, and FQDN) from Proofpoint. If no event types are selected, all event types will be included by default.

configuration.label: Retraction Interval (in hours)
configuration.description: Number of hours to use as the retraction interval for Proofpoint IoC(s) retraction. Valid values are in range from 1 to 168 hours. This parameter will only be considered if "IoC(s) Retraction" is enabled in Threat Exchange Settings.

configuration.label: Initial Range (in hours)
configuration.description: Number of hours Threat IoCs to pull in the initial run. Valid values are in range from 1 to 168 hours.
